Title: Introduction to Azure virtual machines
Description: Learn about the decisions you make before creating a virtual machine, the options to create and manage the VM, and the extensions and services you use to manage your VM.

Title: Design an application architecture
Description: Design an application architecture

Title: Microsoft Education for K-12 IT professionals
Description: In this module, learners will examine how Microsoft Education solutions support IT professionals in K–12 institutions by improving operational efficiency, strengthening security, and enabling more strategic use of time and resources.

Title: Guided project: Set up cost guardrails in Azure
Description: Apply basic cost governance with tags, budget alerts, and policy constraints.

Title: Get started with Cosmos DB in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Learn how Cosmos DB Database in Microsoft Fabric works, the key concepts, and practical examples to help users Cosmos DB Database effectively as part of their analytics solutions.

Title: Use a Docker container as a development environment with Visual Studio Code
Description: Create and configure a full-featured container-based development environment with the Visual Studio Code Dev Containers extension. Open any folder or repository in a container and take advantage of the full feature set of Visual Studio Code, like IntelliSense (completions), code navigation, and debugging.

Title: Prepare for the future of AI with Copilot+ PCs
Description: In this module, you'll learn what makes Copilot+ PCs a new class of AI-powered Windows 11 devices, including how their built-in Neural Processing Units (NPUs) enable faster, more private, and energy-efficient AI experiences.

Title: Boost your productivity with Microsoft Copilot
Description: Learn how to enhance your productivity with Microsoft Copilot. This module covers various aspects of using Copilot to streamline your workflow, manage your time effectively, and support your job search and skill development. Discover how Copilot can assist you in bringing your ideas to life, analyzing images and documents, and providing workplace support.

Title: Operate with DevOps
Description: Achieve operational excellence and enhance developer experience in your organization through DevOps. Your operational and development practices improve by implementing shift-right testing, observability through performance and security monitoring, Site Reliability Engineering and platform engineering.

Title: Manage Microsoft Entra application access
Description: This module focuses on effectively managing identities and enhancing security in Microsoft Enterprise Identity, ensuring that users, groups, and external identities are protected against security threats and unauthorized access.

Title: Deploy and manage DHCP
Description: Deploy and manage DHCP

Title: Back up and restore databases
Description: Back up and restore databases

Title: Secure your identities by using Microsoft Entra ID
Description: Use Microsoft Entra ID to you secure your internal, external, and customer identities.

Title: Get started with Transact-SQL programming
Description: Get started with Transact-SQL programming

Description: Introduction to Transact-SQL

Title: Introduction to GitHub administration
Description: Understand the security and control measures available to GitHub administrators within an organization or enterprise.

Title: Develop a speech agent with the Azure Speech MCP server
Description: Learn how to build an AI agent that uses the Azure Speech MCP server to perform speech-to-text and text-to-speech tasks.

Title: Add looping logic to your code using the do-while and while statements in C#
Description: Use the do-while and while statements to iterate as long as a Boolean expression evaluates to true.

Description: Evaluate whether Blazor is appropriate for your next web development project and learn how Blazor works.

Title: Select Windows Server editions, servicing options, and activation

Description: Your LinkedIn profile is a gateway to networking, career growth, and personal branding. By leveraging Microsoft Copilot, you can refine your headline, summary, and experience sections, ensuring that your profile highlights your strengths and potential, in addition to serving as a valuable interview preparation tool.

Title: Introduction to GitHub Actions
Description: Learn GitHub Actions fundamentals including workflows, events, jobs, and runners to automate your development processes

Title: Challenge project - Build a speech translator app
Description: Learn how to build a speech translation app by using Microsoft Power Apps and integrate it with AI.

Title: Create and manage session host image for Azure Virtual Desktop
Description: A Shared Image Gallery simplifies custom image sharing across your organization. Custom images can be used to bootstrap deployment tasks like preloading applications, application configurations, and other OS configurations.

Title: Interactively debug .NET apps with the Visual Studio debugger
Description: Learn how to efficiently debug your .NET app by using Visual Studio to fix your bugs quickly. Analyze and fix your C# applications by using the interactive debugger within Visual Studio.

Title: Design a dream destination using Microsoft Copilot
Description: Interact with Microsoft Copilot to learn about the capabilities of generative AI. Bring your personal creativity and passion to dream up a novel destination and create the content to help tell its story. Use Microsoft Copilot to ideate, research, and generate content. Use tips and techniques to write good prompts. Apply format and tone.

Title: Select, deploy, and evaluate Microsoft Foundry models
Description: Explore how to select appropriate models from the model catalog using benchmarks, deploy them to endpoints, and evaluate their performance using manual and automated approaches in Microsoft Foundry portal.

Description: Protect, monitor, and tune a migrated database

Title: Deploy and update applications
Description: In this module, you'll master deploying applications using Intune, Configuration Manager, Group Policy, and Microsoft Store Apps. These powerful tools and techniques will equip you to manage and maintain diverse applications across your organization effectively.

Description: Describe Windows Server administration tools

Title: Implement GitHub Actions
Description: GitHub Actions is a powerful CI/CD platform that allows developers to automate their software development workflows. Learn how GitHub actions are implemented, how workflow files are structured, and how to control workflow execution.

Title: Understand hybrid data platform on SQL Server 2025
Description: This module helps users understand the hybrid data platform capabilities of SQL Server 2025.

Title: Introduction to .NET web development with ASP.NET Core
Description: In this module, you'll learn about .NET web development with ASP.NET Core, including what it is and when to use it.

Title: Filter objects out of the pipeline
Description: This module explains how to filter objects out of the pipeline by using the Where-Object cmdlet to specify various criteria.

Title: Define academic and industry requirements for implementing certifications in degree programs
Description: Identify the main processes involved in planning to implement certifications and to define academic and industry requirements in a new program proposal document.

Title: Choose the best Microsoft Surface for your business
Description: Discover how to select the ideal Microsoft Surface device for your business needs by evaluating key decision criteria such as portability, flexibility, battery life, and performance.

Title: Optimize costs by using Azure Hybrid Benefit
Description: Microsoft Azure offers Azure Hybrid Benefit, which helps organizations reduce costs when migrating to the cloud environment. You can leverage several Azure discounts and combine them with other services and strategic pricing offerings.

Title: Manage SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances)
Description: This module explores methods to connect to, and manage, SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances). Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Use functions and modules in Windows PowerShell scripts
Description: This module covers how to create modules and functions in Windows PowerShell scripts.

Title: Migrate Oracle workloads to Azure IaaS virtual machines
Description: Learn how you can migrate your Oracle workloads to Azure IaaS virtual machines.

Description: You learn about the Microsoft Cybersecurity Reference Architecture (MCRA) and Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (MCSB) and how you can use them to design more secure solutions.

Title: Windows at work: Elevate IT teams with Windows 11 Pro
Description: Discover how IT teams can use Microsoft Security Copilot to handle anomalous security events faster and more efficiently.

Description: Learn how Microsoft Foundry on Windows enables developers to build, run, and deploy AI-powered applications locally on Windows devices while supporting hybrid cloud scenarios.

Description: Configure security information and event management (SIEM) security operations using Microsoft Sentinel.

Title: Go to market through the commercial marketplace
Description: This module provides tips and best practices to help organizations create their business plan for success in the commercial marketplace

Title: Manage testing AI-powered business solutions
Description: Learn to validate and maintain AI-powered business solutions with structured testing frameworks, metrics, and governance for enterprise reliability.

Title: Plan a transition to modern endpoint management
Description: Explore considerations and review the planning of transitioning to modern management, focusing on migration and newly provisioned devices.

Title: Microsoft Learn for Educators student certification
Description: Microsoft Learn for Educators student certification

Title: Introduction to threat modeling
Description: Explore the four high-level steps of threat modeling. This engineering technique identifies potential threats early in the development lifecycle.

Title: Connect Power Platform to SAP on Azure
Description: Connect Power Platform to SAP on Azure

Title: Key features and innovations in Windows Server 2025
Description: In this module, you explore the key features of Windows Server 2025.

Title: Use Apache Spark in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Apache Spark is a core technology for large-scale data analytics. Microsoft Fabric provides support for Spark clusters, enabling you to analyze and process data at scale.

Title: Introduction to building copilots for startups
Description: In the rapidly advancing landscape of generative AI, the technology behind copilots continues to evolve. Understanding their potential and harnessing their capabilities is essential for any forward-looking entrepreneur. Whether you're a technologist, writer, entrepreneur, or innovator, we invite you to embark on an enlightening exploration of copilots and their potential to reshape the future of startups in the realm of generative AI. This module offers a comprehensive exploration of the transformational concept of copilots for startups. Discover how these applications, empowered by modern AI and expansive language models, can revolutionize complex cognitive tasks. Learn how startups can strategically use the Azure OpenAI Service to construct and deploy their own copilot to re-imagine user experiences, elevate content development, and harness the power of generative AI to drive innovation and growth. Explore the foundational aspects of copilots, their flexible and customizable platforms, and high-quality text and image generation.

Title: Build multi-item transactions with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: Author stored procedures using JavaScript in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Title: Plan to foster inner source
Description: Learn how to use Git to foster inner source development across your organization and implement fork workflows.

Title: Develop event-driven AI workflows with Azure Event Grid
Description: Learn how to build event-driven AI workflows using Azure Event Grid to route events from sources to handlers with low latency, configure delivery policies, and publish custom events.

Title: Introduction to Azure Machine Learning monitoring
Description: Get an introduction to what you need to know about monitoring Azure Machine Learning deployments.

Title: Build product roadmaps
Description: Identify and construct Agile product roadmaps including audiences, prioritization, themes, milestones, epics, and user stories.

Title: Introduction to the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework
Description: This module covers the basics of how to use the Cloud Adoption Framework to help you align your strategy for business, people, and technology.

Title: Introduction to Polyglot Notebooks
Description: You can use Polyglot Notebooks to create and run code in multiple languages in a single document. This module introduces you to Polyglot Notebooks and shows you how to create and run code in multiple languages.

Title: Cleanse, transform, and load data into Unity Catalog
Description: Learn how to cleanse, transform, and load data into Unity Catalog tables in Azure Databricks by profiling data, handling duplicates and nulls, applying transformations, and using various loading strategies.

Description: Scale apps in Azure App Service

Title: Challenge project - Work with variable data in C#
Description: A challenge project to test C# skills working with variable data.

Title: Implement the Visual Studio Code debugging tools for C#
Description: This module explores the tools and processes used to debug C# console applications in Visual Studio Code. Hands-on activities provide experience using breakpoints, conditional breakpoints, and the debugging resources in the RUN AND DEBUG view.

Title: Introduction to Azure Firewall
Description: Describe how Azure Firewall protects Azure Virtual Network resources, including the Azure Firewall features, rules, deployment options, and administration with Azure Firewall Manager.

Title: Configure and manage guardrails in Microsoft Foundry
Description: Safeguard your AI workloads with Microsoft Foundry guardrails. Discover how to configure and validate content filters, blocklists, and Prompt Shields to protect sensitive data, ensure responsible model behavior, and continuously improve AI safety.

Description: Implement high availability of Windows Server VMs

Description: This content is a part of Create tables, views, and temporary objects.

Title: Explore migration options for SAP on Azure
Description: This module explores strategies for migration of SAP workloads to Azure, including migration of on-premises SAP workloads to Azure in conjunction to performing an upgrade. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Analyze requirements for AI-powered business solutions
Description: Learn to analyze, design, and implement AI-powered business solutions using agents, generative AI, and Microsoft Copilot for productivity.

Title: Manage records and disposition with Microsoft Purview
Description: Manage records and disposition with Microsoft Purview.

Title: Create accessible web apps by using ASP.NET Core
Description: Diagnose and fix common web accessibility issues in an ASP.NET Core application.

Title: Develop for Azure SQL Database
Description: Learn how to create and configure an Azure SQL Database. You'll use SQL Database Projects in VS Code, including installing the extension, importing, and modifying a schema. Additionally, you'll build and deploy database projects in GitHub Actions and Azure Pipelines, and automate and invoke the publishing of a database.

Title: Just Enough Administration in Windows Server
Description: Streamline the administration of your Windows Server environments with Just Enough Administration (JEA). Limit privileged operations to a set of specified PowerShell cmdlets, parameters and variables, and limit which users can connect to JEA endpoints. Constrain the level of privilege those users have when performing administrative tasks.

Description: Deploy a Jakarta EE application to JBoss EAP on Azure App Service and bind it to Azure Database for MySQL.

Description: Discover how to leverage Microsoft Defender for Cloud through the Azure portal to ensure the security of your Azure services and workloads, offering continuous threat detection and prevention.

Description: Get started with data science in Microsoft Fabric by learning how to train a model in a notebook, and track your metrics with MLflow and experiments.

Title: Select and Configure Compute in Azure Databricks
Description: Learn how to select and configure appropriate compute resources in Azure Databricks including serverless, classic compute, SQL warehouses, and job clusters. Master performance tuning, access control, and library management.

Title: Interactively debug .NET apps with the Visual Studio Code debugger
Description: Learn how to efficiently debug your .NET app by using Visual Studio Code to fix your bugs quickly. Use the interactive debugger within Visual Studio Code to analyze and fix your C# applications.

Description: Explain how a source control system helps manage files

Description: Learn how to deploy applications to Azure Kubernetes Service.

Title: Build a to-do list with Blazor
Description: Learn how to build a to-do list with Blazor.

Title: Threat hunting with Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Learn how to proactively identify threat behaviors by using Microsoft Sentinel queries.

Title: Introduction to Microsoft Defender for IoT
Description: Evaluate whether Microsoft Defender for IoT is right for unified asset discovery and security monitoring across your business-critical network environments.

Title: Use advanced Windows PowerShell remoting techniques
Description: This module covers some useful advanced techniques that help overcome the limitations of basic Windows PowerShell remoting.

Title: Training with AI tools
Description: In this module, you learn various AI-powered tools and how to effectively use them in your training sessions for an optimized learning experience.

Title: Create and manage Microsoft Sentinel workspaces
Description: Create and manage Microsoft Sentinel workspaces

Title: Create an open-source program by using GitHub best practices
Description: Learn to create a successful open-source program by establishing contributor guidance, following proven processes, and by using community standards.

Title: Design a data partitioning strategy
Description: Design a data partitioning strategy

Title: Analyze app telemetry with logs and metrics
Description: Query, visualize, and act on application telemetry collected in Application Insights to detect failures, identify performance trends, and maintain operational visibility for AI solutions on Azure.

Title: Create a personalized savings plan to work toward a financial goal
Description: Learn how to build a strong financial foundation by exploring practical saving strategies. Discover how small steps today can lead to achieving large goals tomorrow.

Title: Explore just-in-time virtual machine access
Description: Discover how to use Microsoft Defender for Cloud through the Azure portal to ensure the security of your Azure services and workloads, offering continuous threat detection and prevention.

Title: Build serverless apps with Go
Description: You can build serverless apps by using almost any programming language that supports HTTP primitives. By using custom handlers, you can choose a runtime that suits you.

Title: Connect IoT data to mixed reality with Azure Digital Twins and Unity
Description: Stream simulated operational telemetry data from physical assets to Azure Digital Twins and visualize data in Unity and mixed reality. Learn how to use an ARM template, create a user interface in Unity, and identify performance events before deploying to a HoloLens 2.

Title: Monitor activities in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Learn how to use the monitoring hub in Microsoft Fabric to track activity status, investigate failures, and view historical run data. Explore how Activator responds to Fabric job events with automated alerts and actions.

Title: Explore security practices for Azure SQL Database
Description: Learn how security works in Azure SQL Database, the key concepts, and practical examples to help developers effectively utilize Azure SQL Database in their cloud-based applications.

Title: Get started with AI-powered information extraction in Azure
Description: Learn how to use Azure Content Understanding in Foundry Tools to extract information from content.

Title: Use GitHub Copilot plan mode for cloud operations tasks
Description: Learn how to use GitHub Copilot plan mode to create structured implementation plans for cloud infrastructure changes and system administration tasks.
